name: time_dim_hour_classifier
description: Classifier that predicts the hour of day directly from the encoded time value.
comment: Added as a lookup-style classifier where t_time should map strongly to t_hour and provide a small but clean sanity-check task.

name: time_dim_day_part_classifier
description: Classifier that predicts a coarse day-part bucket directly from hour-of-day.
comment: Added as a direct thresholding classifier where the target bucket is defined entirely by t_hour, making it a clean sanity-check classification task.
target_expression: CASE WHEN t_hour < 6 THEN 0 WHEN t_hour < 12 THEN 1 WHEN t_hour < 18 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END
